name: Fresh Corn Relish
recipeIngredient: 1 Green bell pepper, diced into small pieces
1 Red bell pepper, diced into small pieces
4 Scallions, green and white parts sliced crosswise
Kernels from 8 ears of Yellow corn
recipeInstructions:
Adapted from "Judy Gorman's Vegetable Cookbook."
Combine water, vinegar, sugar, and salt in a large non-aluminum saucepan.
Stir in celery seed, mustard seed, turmeric, Tabasco, diced peppers, and onion.
Bring mixture to a simmer and cook, uncovered, for 10 minutes. Add corn and cilantro, increase heat, stir, and cook until almost all liquid has evaporated. Cool, then chill overnight to blend flavors.
